purpose: Single source of truth for Mall source registry. Canonical list of upstream stores that feed the Plugin Mall scan pipeline, plus the Mall itself (provenance=true) per PLAN-mall-automation.md v3 / ADR-008. Each entry maps a store name to its git remote, plugin layout, editorial tier, and provenance flag. Consumed by scripts/store-sync.cjs, scripts/mall-clone.cjs, scripts/mall-quality-audit.cjs, scripts/mall-non-coding-candidates.cjs.

stores.name: microsoft-copilot-studio-skills
stores.notes: Microsoft official Copilot Studio agent dev skills. 31 SKILL.md units at skills/<name>/SKILL.md with user-invocable/argument-hint/allowed-tools/context frontmatter. Score 9/10 (M:2 A:1 L:2 F:2 D:2). Verified by dry-run clone 2026-06-23.

stores.name: microsoft-win-dev-skills
stores.notes: Microsoft official Windows app dev skills (WinUI 3 + Windows App SDK). 8 SKILL.md units at plugins/winui/skills/<name>/SKILL.md (winui-setup, winui-design, winui-packaging, winui-code-review, etc.). pluginDir is scoped to winui because the repo has plugins/<area>/skills/<name>/ 3-level layout and the scanner walks 2 levels; if Microsoft adds non-WinUI areas later, repoint pluginDir or split entries. Score 9/10 (M:2 A:1 L:2 F:2 D:2). Verified by dry-run clone 2026-06-23.

stores.name: flutter-ai-rules
stores.notes: Flutter/Dart AI development skills for Cursor/Copilot/Antigravity/Windsurf. 29 SKILL.md units at skills/<name>/SKILL.md. Opens Flutter domain (zero coverage in registry before this entry). Score 8/10 (M:2 A:1 L:2 F:2 D:1). Verified by dry-run clone 2026-06-23.

stores.name: robotics-agent-skills
stores.notes: Robotics/ROS AI agent skills. 10 SKILL.md units at skills/<name>/SKILL.md plus evals/ folder. Opens robotics domain (zero coverage in registry before this entry). Score 8/10 (M:2 A:1 L:2 F:2 D:1). Verified by dry-run clone 2026-06-23.

stores.name: styleseed
stores.notes: Design-system + UI judgment skills for Claude Code / Codex / Cursor. 15 SKILL.md units at engine/.claude/skills/ss-<name>/SKILL.md (ss-a11y, ss-audit, ss-component, ss-copy, ss-feedback, ss-flow, ss-lint, ss-motion, ss-page, ss-pattern, ss-review, ss-score, ss-setup, ss-tokens, ss-update). Unusual pluginDir is the upstream's project-local install path (.claude is a Claude Code convention, NOT a skip-pattern — the dot only suppresses dir iteration at the walker's root, not when explicitly named as pluginDir). 1 additional top-level showcase skill at skills/styleseed-design-review/ is intentionally not the canonical 15-skill set; pluginDir points at the design-system core. Opens design-system domain (zero coverage in registry before this entry). Score 9/10 (M:2 A:1 L:2 F:2 D:2). Verified by dry-run clone 2026-06-23.

stores.name: plugin-mall
stores.notes: The Mall itself, scanned for its own curated plugins. Provenance bonus +50 reflects Supervisor editorial adaptation. Mall-curated plugins ship with adapted_from field linking back to upstream they were derived from. Filtered out by Supervisor-side scripts (store-sync, mall-clone, mall-quality-audit) — those scan third-party MALL clones only. The Mall self-scan happens in the Mall repo in Phase 2+.
